Overview  Package  Class   Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV   NEXT FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.Parameter

Packages that use Parameter
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http Mediagroup parameters specialized for HTTP file play and record 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common Manage resources that can be inserted in different ResourceContainers like MediaGroups, NetworkConnections or MixerAdapters. 
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server. 
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol declared as Parameter
static Parameter MediaObject.MEDIAOBJECT_ID
          A non-mutable ID string, replacing the system-provided ID.
static Parameter MediaSession.TIMEOUT
          The value of this Parameter is an Integer, in milliseconds, after which an API call (on the objects created by this MediaSession) should timeout.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return types with arguments of type Parameter
 java.util.Set<Parameter> SupportedFeatures.getSupportedParameters()
          Provide the Set of supported Parameters.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol with parameters of type Parameter
 Parameters MediaObject.getParameters(Parameter[] params)
          Gets the value of various Parameter's from the media object.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as Parameter
static Parameter Recorder.APPEND
          Indicates that recording should append to the end of an existing TVM rather than overwrite it.
static Parameter Recorder.AUDIO_CLOCKRATE
          The desired clock rate (or sample rate) of the audio encoding
The value is an Integer, in Hz.
static Parameter Player.AUDIO_CODEC
          Parameter identifying the audio codec used.
static Parameter Recorder.AUDIO_CODEC
          Parameter identifying the audio Codec used for a new recording.
static Parameter Recorder.AUDIO_FMTP
          A string-valued list of detailed audio codec parameters, in the format described by rfc4566.
static Parameter Recorder.AUDIO_MAX_BITRATE
          The maximum accepted bitrate for the audio stream.
static Parameter SpeechDetectorConstants.BARGE_IN_ENABLED
          Controls whether the caller can start speaking before prompts have ended.
static Parameter Recorder.BEEP_FREQUENCY
          The frequency of the start beep.
static Parameter Recorder.BEEP_LENGTH
          Length of Beep preceeding recording.
static Parameter Player.BEHAVIOUR_IF_BUSY
          Indicates the action to take if Player is busy when play() is invoked.
static Parameter Player.ENABLED_EVENTS
          An array of Player EventType's, indicating which events are generated and delivered to the application.
static Parameter Recorder.ENABLED_EVENTS
          An array of Recorder EventType's, indicating which events are generated and delivered to the application.
static Parameter Player.FILE_FORMAT
          A Parameter identifying the File Format used during a play.
static Parameter Recorder.FILE_FORMAT
          A Parameter identifying the File Format used during recording.
static Parameter SpeechDetectorConstants.FINAL_TIMEOUT
          Controls the length of a period of silence after callers have spoken to conclude they finished.
static Parameter SpeechDetectorConstants.INITIAL_TIMEOUT
          Controls how long the recognizer should wait after the end of the prompt for the caller to speak before sending a Recorder event (COMPLETED, INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXPIRED, null, NO_ERROR).
static Parameter Player.INTERVAL
          When REPEAT_COUNT is greater than 1, the player waits for INTERVAL milliseconds between each repetition.
static Parameter Player.JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT
          Integer number of items to jump forward or backward in the play list, for either a JUMP_FORWARD_IN_PLAYLIST or JUMP_BACKWARD_IN_PLAYLIST.
static Parameter Player.JUMP_TIME
          Integer number of milliseconds by which the current play list items offset is changed by JUMP_FORWARD or JUMP_BACKWARD.
static Parameter Player.MAX_DURATION
          Integer indicating maximum duration of a play request.
static Parameter Recorder.MAX_DURATION
          Positive Integer indicating the maximum duration (in milliseconds) for a record.
static Parameter Recorder.MIN_DURATION
          Integer indicating minimum duration (in milliseconds) that constitutes a valid recording.
static Parameter Recorder.PROMPT
          Indicates a prompt to be played before the recording starts.
static Parameter Player.REPEAT_COUNT
          The play request will be repeated REPEAT_COUNT times.
static Parameter SpeechDetectorConstants.SENSITIVITY
          Sensitivity of the speech detector when looking for speech.
static Parameter Recorder.SIGNAL_TRUNCATION_ON
          Boolean indicating whether signal(DTMF) truncation is enabled.
static Parameter Recorder.SILENCE_TERMINATION_ON
          Boolean indicating if a silence will terminate the recording.
static Parameter Recorder.SPEECH_DETECTION_MODE
          A Parameter identifying the Speech detection mode.
static Parameter Recorder.START_BEEP
          Boolean indicating whether subsequent record will be preceded with a beep.
static Parameter Player.START_IN_PAUSED_MODE
          Boolean indicating that this or subsequent play should be started in the Paused state.
static Parameter Recorder.START_IN_PAUSED_MODE
          Boolean indicating whether subsequent record will start in PAUSE mode.
static Parameter Player.START_OFFSET
          Indicates the offset in the file, at which the play should start.
static Parameter Recorder.VIDEO_CODEC
          Parameter indicating the video codec to use for a new recording (if it includes a video track).
static Parameter Recorder.VIDEO_FMTP
          A string-valued list of detailed video codec parameters
static Parameter Recorder.VIDEO_MAX_BITRATE
          The maximum accepted bitrate for the video stream.
static Parameter Player.VOLUME_CHANGE
          Determines the amount by which the volume is changed by the RTC actions VOLUME_UP and VOLUME_DOWN.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http declared as Parameter
static Parameter HttpFilePlayerConstants.FETCH_TIMEOUT
          The interval in ms to wait for the content to be returned before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.
static Parameter HttpFilePlayerConstants.FILE_MAX_AGE
          Indicates that the player is willing to use content whose age is no greater than the specified time in seconds (cf. max-age in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter HttpFilePlayerConstants.FILE_MAX_STALE
          Indicates that the player is willing to use content that has exceeded its expiration time (cf. max-stale in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter HttpFileRecorderConstants.HTTP_METHOD
          Indicates witch http method to use for the record.
static Parameter HttpFilePlayerConstants.STREAMING_ENABLED
          If true, The play of the file will start before the entire file is received from the HTTP server
static Parameter HttpFileRecorderConstants.SUBMIT_TIMEOUT
          The interval in ms to wait for the content to be transfered to the http server before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals declared as Parameter
static Parameter SignalDetector.BUFFER_SIZE
          Size of the signal buffer.
static Parameter SignalDetector.BUFFERING
          Enable/disable buffering of signals.
static Parameter SignalDetector.ENABLED_EVENTS
          An array of SignalGenerator event types, indicating which events are generated for the application.
static Parameter SignalDetector.FILTERED_PATTERNS
          Enable/disable pattern filtering.
static Parameter SignalDetector.INITIAL_TIMEOUT
          Maximum time limit for first signal.
static Parameter SignalDetector.INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT
          Maximum time limit between consecutive signals.
static Parameter SignalGenerator.INTER_SIGNAL_GAP
          Pause duration between each DTMF, as a positive Integer, in milliseconds
static Parameter SignalDetector.MAX_DURATION
          Maximum time duration for retrieving signals in milliseconds.
static Parameter[] SignalDetector.NO_PATTERN
          A constant to use as second argument of SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int, Parameter[], RTC[], Parameters) when no pattern is involved.
static Parameter[] SignalDetector.PATTERN
          An array of pattern Parameter's.
static Parameter SignalDetector.PATTERN_COUNT
          Number of pattern definitions supported by this SignalDetector resource.
static Parameter SignalDetector.PROMPT
          Indicates a prompt to be played before the signal detection starts.
static Parameter SignalGenerator.SIGNAL_AMPLITUDE
          DTMF modulation level, in dB.
static Parameter SignalGenerator.SIGNAL_LENGTH
          DTMF duration, as a positive Integer, in milliseconds
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals with parameters of type Parameter
 void SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int numSignals, Parameter[] patternLabels, RTC[] rtcs, Parameters optargs)
          Retrieves some signals from the signal buffer.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer declared as Parameter
static Parameter MediaMixer.ENABLED_EVENTS
          An array of Mixer EventType's, indicating which events are generated and delivered to the application.
static Parameter MediaMixer.MAX_ACTIVE_INPUTS
          Only this number of (loudest talking) inputs (participants) are included in the mix.
static Parameter MediaMixer.MAX_PORTS
          Maximum number of media objects (Joinable's) that can be joined to the Mixer.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection declared as Parameter
static Parameter SdpPortManager.SIP_HEADERS
          This parameter allows the application to pass to the SdpPortManager some SIP Headers that may be of interest for media transport, like user-agent identification.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common declared as Parameter
static Parameter VolumeConstants.VOLUME_CHANGE
          Determines the amount by which the volume is changed by the RTC actions VOLUME_UP and VOLUME_DOWN.
 

Uses of Parameter in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml declared as Parameter
static Parameter VxmlDialog.AUTO_START
          If set to Boolean.TRUE, the dialog will start immediately and automatically when it is prepared.
static Parameter VxmlDialog.CONNECTION_DATA
          This optional parameter provides the script with the signalling message, or any other signalling data pertaining to the remote connection.
static Parameter VxmlDialog.DOCUMENT_MAX_AGE
          Indicates that the file is willing to use content whose age is no greater than the specified time in seconds (cf. max-age in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter VxmlDialog.DOCUMENT_MAX_STALE
          Indicates that the file is willing to use content that has exceeded its expiration time (cf. max-stale in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter VxmlDialog.FETCH_TIMEOUT
          The interval in ms to wait for the content to be returned before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.
